title: Minky 3 Tier Plus Clothes Airer, Clothes Drying Rack, 21m Washing Line, Laundry, Foldable Indoor Airer, Includes 4 Corner Hooks, Space Saving Clothes Rack, Indoor and Outdoor Use
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Large Drying Space - With 21m of drying space you can easily dry all your laundry. With extra fold out hangers, you can easily dry 2+ laundry loads.
Easy to Use - With fold down hooks, you can collapse & store your airer in seconds. The locking mechanism prevents sagging & keeps your airer upright.
3 tier - With 4 hanger hooks & a 3 tier design, this airer is ideal for drying long garments. The spacious rails allow for easy air flow & fast drying
Durable - Made from strong steel, this airer is designed to last for many laundry loads, with non-slip feet you can be sure your floor is protected.
Made with precision & expertise, our products are both: quality & durability. Our manufacture experience have made us the preferred choice since 1941
description: Product Description Minky 3 Tier Plus Airer With an impressive 21 metres of hanging space, this airer can accommodate all your laundry needs. High Quality With its robust construction, this airer can effortlessly support heavy loads without compromising on stability. Flip Out Corners Its clever design includes 4 flip-out corners, allowing you to hang up to 12 additional hangers. Wider Hanging Rungs With its extra space between each rung, this airer ensures optimum airflow and circulation, allowing your clothes to dry faster than ever. Secure Locking Handle With its innovative double-sided auto-lock mechanism, this airer ensures stability and safety for your laundry. Sturdy Joints Featuring sturdy moulded joints, this airer provides exceptional strength and stability, allowing you to confidently hang multiple items.
